title: Lavish Designs by Tee
description:
Create a magical atmosphere with our premium fabric draping and fairy light services.
We specialize in turning ordinary venues into breathtaking wonderlands using only the finest materials and expert craftsmanship.

Our luxurious, flowing chiffon is carefully selected for its soft texture, beautiful sheen, and ability to catch light in the most dreamy way.
Available in ivory, white, champagne, blush, or any custom shade to match your vision, the fabric cascades from ceilings and walls like gentle clouds, instantly softening harsh architecture and creating an intimate, romantic embrace around your guests.

Thousands of warm-white fairy lights are then woven seamlessly through the draping, producing that coveted twinkle that photographs like stardust.
Whether you desire a softly glowing canopy above the dance floor, a fully lit ceiling that mimics a night sky filled with stars, elegant wall swags framing your head table, or a show-stopping backdrop behind the ceremony or sweetheart table, we design every detail to feel effortless yet utterly enchanting.

Pricing is based on a standard hall size (up to 5,000 square feet with ceilings under 14 feet).
The quoted rate is all-inclusive: it covers your personalized design consultation, premium chiffon in your chosen color and volume, professional-grade fairy lights with commercial safety certification, complete installation by our experienced team the day before or morning of your event, and discreet dismantling the same night or following day so you never lift a finger.

Imagine your guests stepping into a space bathed in golden warmth, where every corner sparkles and the ceiling feels infinite.
Couples exchange vows beneath a canopy of light, friends raise glasses under a sea of stars, and every photograph captures that ethereal glow you only see in fairytales.

Let us weave the magic for you.
Reserve our fabric draping and fairy light transformation today, and give your celebration the mesmerizing, heart-fluttering ambiance it truly deserves.
Because some moments are meant to feel like pure enchantment.

features.title: Personalized Décor Themes1
features.description: Every event deserves its own story. We design décor concepts that perfectly match your event’s theme, style, and atmosphere — from elegant and classic to modern and vibrant.

features.title: Expert Consultation and Setup
features.description: Our professional designers guide you through every step, from initial planning to on-site execution, ensuring your vision is brought to life seamlessly.

features.title: Premium Materials and Finishing
features.description: Every vendor on eEvents is carefully vetted for quality, reliability, and professionalism so you can book with confidence.

features.title: Versatile for All Occasions
features.description: Whether it’s a wedding, birthday, corporate event, or religious ceremony, our décor services adapt beautifully to any setting or scale.

features.title: Reliable and On-Time Execution
features.description: We understand the importance of timing in event planning. Our team delivers prompt setup, flawless coordination, and meticulous attention to detail for a stress-free experience.

additionalService.title: Event Branding and Signage
additionalService.description: Custom welcome boards, photo walls, and signage that tie the décor into the event’s identity.

additionalService.title: Tableware and Accessory Styling
additionalService.description: Elegant table settings, linens, and centerpiece coordination for a complete, polished look.

additionalService.title: Draping and Fabric Styling
additionalService.description: Stylish fabric installations for ceilings, walls, and entrances that add warmth and sophistication.

additionalService.title: Lounge and VIP Area Design
additionalService.description: Design and furnish comfortable seating zones with a luxurious touch for VIP guests and special areas.

additionalService.title: Lighting Design and Ambiance Creation
additionalService.description: Stylish attendants to greet guests, assist with guest seating, and also, maintain order.

reviews.comment: Best planners ever! They made our big day perfect.

title: Small Chops & Grills Package
description: Perfect for cocktail hours or as appetizers. Package includes samosas, spring rolls, puff puff, mosa, BBQ chicken, and peppered gizzards for up to 150 guests. Live grilling station available as an add-on.

title: Gold Chiavari Chairs with Cushions
description: Add a touch of timeless elegance to your event with our premium gold Chiavari chairs, featuring a lustrous gold finish that reflects light beautifully and creates an atmosphere of refined luxury while remaining lightweight yet sturdy to offer stunning style and lasting comfort, perfect for romantic weddings, upscale galas, milestone celebrations, or corporate dinners as they complement soft pastels, bold jewel tones, or sleek modern décor with effortless grace, with our all-inclusive price covering professional delivery, expert setup, and your choice of crisp white or deep black cushions so you can focus entirely on your occasion, reserve today and give your celebration the radiant golden glow it deserves because some moments simply deserve to shine.

title: The Dynamics - 6-Piece Live Band
description: Experience the energy of live music! Our 6-piece band (vocals, drums, bass, guitar, keyboard, talking drum) plays a mix of Highlife, Juju, Afrobeats, and Gospel. Perfect for keeping the dance floor alive.
